creator: tomas@ciernik.sk
text:
Hello,

this bug occurs on 11.3-RELEASE amd64 too. It can be solved by disabling ODBC, but not when SQL database connection is needed.

Error log is available at https://sona.ciernik.sk/poudriere/data/113amd64-local-erlang/2019-11-19_12h20m15s/logs/errors/erlang-21.3.8.10,4.log
